name: Picadillo (Rice-and-beef Hash/filling)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Cooked ground beef (sirloin or top round)
1 medium Tomato, blanched, peeled, seeded, and chopped
1 small Apple, pared, cored, and chopped
1 Canned jalapeno pepper, drained, seeded, and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a 10-inch skillet.
2. Add beef and cook until crumbly, breaking up large pieces with a wooden spoon.
3. Stir in onions and garlic; sauté until onions are softened (about 5 minutes).
4. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
5. Reduce heat to low and stir occasionally until flavors are well blended (about 20 minutes).
Serve with rice or as a filling for tacos or tortillas. Makes 2 servings.
